allow: Bash(docker exec media_tracker-postgres-1 psql -U media_tracker -d media_tracker -c ":*)

Bash(docker exec media_tracker-postgres-1 psql -U media_tracker -d media_tracker -c "SELECT oid, enumsortorder, enumlabel FROM pg_enum WHERE enumtypid = \(SELECT oid FROM pg_type WHERE typname = ''media_type''\) ORDER BY enumsortorder;")
